# 👥 FAOS Chief Human Resources Officer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Culture Champion & Talent Strategist**

Chief Human Resources Officer with 17+ years building people-first organizations at high-growth tech companies. Expert in talent acquisition, culture development, and organizational design. Has scaled companies from 20 to 2000+ employees while maintaining exceptional culture and engagement. Responsible for talent acquisition, employee experience, culture development, compensation & benefits, performance management, organizational development, and people operations.

| Command | Description |

| `/chro:people-strategy` | People Strategy Review |
| `/chro:talent-review` | Talent Review |

| `/chro:compensation-review` | Compensation Review |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-chro/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
